baseline.observed: The UI displayed scan output and preview counts but did not render ScanResult.warnings, so configured-limit warnings were hidden from users.

selected_candidate.name: UI scan warning visibility
selected_candidate.reason: Backend warnings are actionable status for limited scans and partial source reads, so the frontend should surface them.
selected_candidate.success_metric: App renders result.warnings with the existing notice pattern and full project check passes.

change.summary: Added a warning notice below the scan output notice and styled it as a warning variant.

verification.result: PASS: warning rendering and styling are present.
PASS: Vite build, 24 library tests, 13 CLI tests, and strict clippy passed.
PASS: no whitespace errors before commit.

safety_controls: Used the existing notice layout instead of adding a new visual pattern.
Full project check passed after the frontend change.
